prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog cover illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor: red hair, black outfit, cross detail. The article idea comes first; Avilia should be actively building a tool.

Scene: Avilia builds a small automated stock selector machine on a clean desk. Daily K-line cards flow in from the left, pass through strategy filters and backtest gauges, then a small candidate stock list comes out on the right. The mood is curious and playful, not financial hype.

Core meaning: a coder starts building a daily K-line based automatic stock picking system.

Style: clean Chinese technical blog illustration, lots of white space, black/red/white with small blue system lights. Minimal labels: "日K", "策略", "备选名单", "先动手".

Avoid investment advice feeling, avoid money piles, avoid dense trading dashboard, avoid giant title text.
